name: LINE Bot Plugin
description: A Plugin for sending instructions to multi-agents from LINE and receiving results. Uses the LINE Messaging API to enable ticket creation, progress checking, and approval operations from the chat screen.
use_cases: Check progress and query status via LINE
Deliver deliverables and briefing notifications to chat rooms
note: Requires LINE Channel Access Token configuration. Not included in the core — installed as a Plugin add-on.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
